/opt/stm32cubeide/plugins/com.st.stm32cube.ide.mcu.externaltools.gnu-tools-for-stm32.14.3.rel1.linux64_1.0.100.202602081740/tools/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv5-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv5-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wl,--gc-sections -specs=nano.specs -specs=nosys.specs -T/home/groovy-byte-desk/h5_motor_driver/STM32H562xx_FLASH.ld CMakeFiles/h5_motor_driver.elf.dir/Core/Src/hal_motor.c.obj CMakeFiles/h5_motor_driver.elf.dir/Core/Src/kinematics.c.obj
